sections.text: demo-service is the API gateway layer (Go/Kitex), responsible for frontend aggregation and routing.
Concurrent ordering: the same user may send multiple booking requests simultaneously, the gateway must enforce idempotency.
All RPC calls to downstream services must forward the X-Auth-Token header; missing it causes 403.
item-center (com.example.item_center) is the search aggregation layer, called via item-sdk. Interface changes require updating the SDK version.
During testing, use mock headers to control mock mode. Values can be scenario names or 'proxy'. Ensure persistent metainfo is propagated end-to-end.
Cost sharing rules: category A 25% personal, category B 20%, category C tiered by overage ratio.
